metadata.method_name: Mode-A: closure-certified composition over disjunctive LLM reads (matched-coverage showdown)
metadata.experiment: RCC-8 real-LLM matched-coverage arm + 3-point algebra-richness scaling curve (point 3 -> RCC-8 8 -> Allen 13). experiment_iter3 gen_art_experiment_3.

arm_provenance.rcc8: THIS iter-3 run (fresh real-LLM reads on synthetic RCC-8)
arm_provenance.note: All three arms: SAME model google/gemini-3.1-flash-lite, temp 0, knob S4_sound, seed 20260617, matched-coverage protocol, paired-bootstrap + Holm. Legitimate apples-to-apples; point/allen merged from ...

data_provenance.note: gold atomic relations read off the realization model; query DEDUCTION-REQUIRED

H3_iteration_real.metric_note: 'full'/'naive' = resolve-to-CORRECT-singleton rate; 'full_cov'/'naive_cov' = resolve-to-singleton (coverage) rate. The iteration advantage of full PC over naive single-pass shows as a positive coverag...

H3_iteration_gold.metric_note: 'full'/'naive' = resolve-to-CORRECT-singleton rate; 'full_cov'/'naive_cov' = resolve-to-singleton (coverage) rate. The iteration advantage of full PC over naive single-pass shows as a positive coverag...

C2_on_vs_off.note: OFF never reads the query edge locally (s,t never co-occur), so its single-relation coverage is 0; Mode-A coverage IS the deduction-required bite recovered by the composition floor.

audit.interpretation: On all-sound networks Mode-A's closed query SET must contain gold (soundness of PC) -> zero-FP-conditional-on-soundness ~1.0; silent-wrong arises ONLY from unsound reads.

reads.sentence: The shareholder vote came after the maintenance window.
The shareholder vote came after the network upgrade.
The vendor negotiation occurred before the maintenance window.
The vendor negotiation came before the network upgrade.

decomposition.method: cell-pooled (n-weighted) from this arm's leaderboard + H3 aggregates
decomposition.inherited_is: INHERITED neuro-symbolic premise: a single exact composition-table step (naive single-pass) already beats LLM per-path composition.
decomposition.novel_is: NOVEL contribution of iterated PC closure: resolves deduction-deep (hop>=3 / cyclomatic>=1) queries a single naive pass leaves open.

point.provenance: point/allen reproduced from iter-2 experiment_iter2_dir3 (identical model/seed/knob/prompts/networks/cache); merged here for the 3-point algebra-richness scaling curve.

C2_on_vs_off.note: OFF never reads the query edge locally (s,t never co-occur), so its single-relation coverage is 0; Mode-A coverage IS the deduction-required bite recovered by the composition floor.

audit.interpretation: On all-sound networks Mode-A's closed query SET must contain gold (soundness of PC) -> zero-FP-conditional-on-soundness ~1.0; silent-wrong arises ONLY from unsound reads.

decomposition.inherited_is: premise inherited from neuro-symbolic literature: a single exact composition-table step (naive single-pass) already beats LLM per-path composition (naive > PoT).
decomposition.novel_is: the contribution of THIS method: iterated PC closure (full) resolves deduction-deep queries (hop>=3 / cyclomatic>=1) that a single naive pass leaves underdetermined (full > naive).
decomposition.note: decomposition selective accuracies are on the bite-bearing pool; RCC-8 full/naive resolve-correct rates are SOUND LOWER BOUNDS (PC-2 sound-but-incomplete).

reads.sentence: The embassy compound is completely separate from the riverside walk.
The embassy compound and the sports complex meet at their boundary but share no interior.
The parking precinct and the riverside walk partially overlap.
The parking precinct and the sports complex cover precisely the same region.

reads.sentence: The recruitment drive and the venue booking began together, but the recruitment drive ended first.
The recruitment drive and the trademark dispute occurred over precisely the same interval.
The maintenance window and the venue booking ended together, but the maintenance window began later.
The maintenance window began exactly as the trademark dispute ended.
The design review and the curriculum update spanned exactly the same period.
The design review started at the very moment the board meeting finished.
The site inspection finished at the very moment the curriculum update started.
The site inspection and the board meeting ended together, but the site inspection began later.

allen.pc_completeness: PC-SOUND-BUT-INCOMPLETE (Allen consistency NP-hard): coverage / collapse are SOUND LOWER BOUNDS.

allen.provenance: point/allen reproduced from iter-2 experiment_iter2_dir3 (identical model/seed/knob/prompts/networks/cache); merged here for the 3-point algebra-richness scaling curve.

verdict.headline: H1 CONFIRMED on all arms (Mode-A > PoT AND > SC at matched coverage, Holm). point: vs POT Δ=+0.043(sig), vs SC Δ=+0.146(sig) | rcc8: vs POT Δ=+0.448(sig), vs SC Δ=+0.621(sig) | allen: vs POT Δ=+0.676(...

cross_algebra_synthesis.finding: The closure advantage over neural per-path reasoning scales with relation-algebra richness (point 3 -> RCC-8 8 -> Allen 13 base relations): on the 3-relation convex point algebra a strong neural basel...
cross_algebra_synthesis.monotonicity_note: advantage_grows_with_algebra_richness = gap_vs_pot is monotone non-decreasing across point<rcc8<allen (tol 0.0); an out-of-order RCC-8 point is reported honestly, not suppressed.

verdict.scope: REAL-LLM-READ-ON-SYNTHETIC; point=PC-complete exact arm, allen=NP-hard lower-bound generality

metadata.merge_note: point/allen analysis + datasets are iter-2 cache replays (identical model/seed/protocol); rcc8 is fresh this iter. See config.arm_provenance.
